package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for fmt_errorf_without_wrap_verb: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `fmt.Errorf("context: %v", err)` instead of `%w`
type CaseFmtErrorfWithoutWrapVerbDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseFmtErrorfWithoutWrapVerbModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseFmtErrorfWithoutWrapVerbRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseFmtErrorfWithoutWrapVerbModel
}

type CaseFmtErrorfWithoutWrapVerbService struct {
    repo *CaseFmtErrorfWithoutWrapVerbRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseFmtErrorfWithoutWrapVerbAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveFmtErrorfWithoutWrapVerb(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseFmtErrorfWithoutWrapVerbDTO) error {
    focus := "fmt_errorf_without_wrap_verb"
    _ = focus
    _, err := os.ReadFile(input)
    if err != nil {
        return fmt.Errorf("failed to read: %v", err)
    }
    fmt_errorf_wrap_verb_positive := map[string]int{"fmt": 1, "errorf": 2, "wrap": 3, "verb": 4}
    fmt_errorf_wrap_verb_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    fmt_positive_0 := fmt_errorf_wrap_verb_positive["fmt"] + len(input)
    _ = fmt_positive_0
    errorf_positive_1 := fmt_errorf_wrap_verb_positive["errorf"] + len(input)
    _ = errorf_positive_1
    wrap_positive_2 := fmt_errorf_wrap_verb_positive["wrap"] + len(input)
    _ = wrap_positive_2
    verb_positive_3 := fmt_errorf_wrap_verb_positive["verb"] + len(input)
    _ = verb_positive_3
    return nil
}
